password: Numera e le iloa e sesi
bugReportSent: O le lipoti na lafo! Faafetai mo le fesoasoani ia i matou le faʻaleleia.
bugReportError: Mea sese lafo le pusa bug. O le toe taumafai.
userAccountOptions: Tagata e faaaoga tagata faaaoga filifiliga
invalidCredentials: Le faʻamaoni o loʻo taʻua, ua e lesitala?
sessionExpired: Ua uma lau sauniga. Toe avatu oe lava.
enterValidEmail: Faʻamolemole tuʻu se tuatusi imeli tuatusi
passwordCannotBeEmpty: O le upu faataga e le mafai ona gaogao
microphonePermissionRequired: E manaʻomia le faʻatagaina o le faʻasilasilaga ile faiga ole masini.
couldNotAccessMicrophone: Le mafai ona ulufale i le Microphone. Faʻasolo siaki le faʻatagaina o lau browser.
failedToStartRecording: Le mafai ona amata faamaumau. Toe taumafai.
errorLoadingTutorial: Initaneti o le mea sese utaina tutorial
noSentencesAvailable: E leai se faʻaiuga o avanoa mo lenei mataupu.
reachedEndOfBook: Taunuu i le faaiuga o le tusi
gdprModalTitle: GDPP8 tulaga ma faʻalilolilo faiga faʻavae
gdprContent:
Matou te faʻaaloalo i lau faʻalilolilo ma ua matou naunau e puipuia au oe lava faʻamatalaga.O le mea lenei e tatau ona e iloa:

• Matou te le faʻatau atu au oe lava faʻamatalaga i isi vaega
• O le mea na matou teuina le mea na e faitauina ma lau tagata faʻaaoga tulaga
• O au faʻamatalaga e faʻaaogaina e naʻo le tuʻuina atu ma faʻaleleia atili la matou gagana aʻoaʻoga
• E mafai ona e tape uma au faʻamatalaga i soʻo se taimi e ala i le alu i le tulaga ma kiliki i le 'tape le teugatupe'
• Matou te tausisia le GDPR tulafono ma au Aloaiga e uiga i au oe lava faʻamatalaga

Ina ua faʻaauau pea ona faʻaaoga la matou tautua, o loʻo e faʻataga ia matou faʻamatalaga aoina ma faʻagaioiga o faʻagaioiga o gaioiga na tuʻuina atu i luga.
